name: goose-agent-framework
description: Multi-agent orchestration framework for the Goose platform. Classifies intents, delegates to specialist agents, enforces tool governance.

quality.loop_description: If a test fails, code goes back to developer, gets fixed, tested again. Repeats until ALL tests pass. No skip button, no override, no merge anyway.
quality.policy: No code without tests. No merge without passing tests. No deployment without coverage gates.
